_comment: Perf TDD assertions. Each `assert` value is the upper bound (<=). Each `baseline` is the pre-optimization measurement. Tests pass iff measured <= assert. The implementation worktrees must move 'measured' from baseline toward assert without breaking visual baselines in docs/perf/baseline/screenshots/.

request_count._note: drop 3 eagerly-loaded related-post teaser images by lazy-loading; KaTeX assets remain conditional

global_assets._comment: These are pre-gzip byte sizes of the assets shipped via /assets/. The assert column is the hard ceiling; the goal column is what we should aim for if we want margin.

/assets/css/main.css.map._note: sourcemap should not be served in production; remove from _site build or exclude via .htaccess

/assets/css/academicons.css._note: minified sibling exists at academicons.min.css; swap reference

/assets/js/main.min.js._note: currently includes jQuery + Plotly theme blobs unconditionally; split or defer

/assets/js/theme.js._note: Plotly theme blob, not needed on most pages — load only when chart present

/images/ensembledme.jpg._note: convert to WebP @ 2x retina with JPEG fallback; smaller dimensions

shipped_but_unused._comment: Files on disk in _site that are not imported by any active SCSS or referenced by any include. Should be byte size 0 after cleanup.

/assets/webfonts/fa-brands-400.ttf._note: ttf is fallback; .woff2 is served. ttf can be dropped if no IE11 support needed

/assets/webfonts/fa-solid-900.ttf._note: same — .woff2 only is fine for evergreen browsers

/assets/fonts/academicons.ttf._note: fallback; woff2 not provided — could add

visual_regression._comment: Pre-optimization screenshots committed to docs/perf/baseline/screenshots/. After every fix, fresh screenshots at the same viewports must look 'effectively identical' (pixel-diff tolerance noted) — any meaningful UI/UX change requires explicit sign-off.
visual_regression.pixel_diff_tolerance: intentional fixes (e.g., footer un-pinning, lazy-load img placeholders) may shift layout; the test passes if (a) no functional regression occurs and (b) the diff is reviewed in the verification commit.
known_intentional_visual_changes_after_o: footer no longer pinned to viewport bottom (fix for layout overlap bug, _sass/layout/_footer.scss:21) — restores upstream minimal-mistakes static-footer behavior matching the in-file comment intent on line 17
